NCIt_Definition: The determination of the amount of pepsinogen A present in a sample.
The determination of the amount of pepsinogen C present in a sample.

A finding indicating the presence of a malignant tumor mass that is formed following the spread of a malignant tumor to two or more adjacent lymph nodes and the resulting fusion and enlargement of the lymph nodes.

NCIt_Synonyms: TUSPLIT; Tumor Mass Fragmentation; Tumor Split
NCIt_Definition: A finding indicating that a tumor mass has been divided into two or more tumors.
